title: 自我關懷賓果遊戲
description:
透過我們互動式的自我關懷活動，滋養您的身心。

完成活動贏取獎品，提升您的心理健康！ 🧠✨
intro: 我們的「自我關懷賓果卡」包含 25 項活動，旨在滋養您的身心。
step2_desc: 一塊瓷磚，用來標記完成。
step3_desc: 每一個請求都是邁向更佳心理健康的一小步，卻意義非凡💙
tip1_desc: 選擇一到兩個圖塊開始整合。
tip2_desc: 試著養成一些每日或每週的習慣。
tip3_desc: 完成每一塊磁磚後都要確認！
tip4_desc: 根據您的生活方式和喜好調整活動。
instructions: 點擊每個活動即可完成。連成一行、一列或一條對角線即可大喊“賓果！”
complete_message: 恭喜！您已成功完成一系列自我照護。您的身心都會感謝您。

tiles.gratitudes: 寫下三件值得感恩的事

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

app_description:
Nurture your mind, body, and soul with our interactive self-care activity.
Complete activities to win and boost your mental wellness! 🧠✨
complete_a_line_of_self_care_to_win: Complete a line of self-care to win!
instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
